name: Golden State Pawn and Guitars
description_short: Independent family-owned pawn and guitar shop in Anaheim specializing in vintage/used guitars, amps, jewelry, and collateral-based loans since 2016.
description_long:
Golden State Pawn & Guitars was established in early 2016 and is located in Anaheim, California at 2743 W. Lincoln Ave. The business is independently owned and operated as a family enterprise by Bobby Alexander, who has over ten years of experience in the guitar and pawn industry. Alexander is a musician himself with a degree in recording engineering from the Los Angeles Film School, bringing both technical expertise and genuine passion to the operation.

The company operates as a full-service pawn shop with a specialization in musical instruments. They buy, sell, loan against, consign, and broker vintage and used guitars and amplifiers. Beyond guitars, they deal in fine gold jewelry, diamonds, watches, consumer electronics, fishing gear, tools, and other items of value. They also offer live sound production and live sound consulting services through team members Hosep Karaca and Kamer Karaca. The business maintains both a physical showroom and online inventory via their website and Reverb Shop.

What distinguishes Golden State Pawn & Guitars is their musician-focused positioning and founder expertise. The shop was explicitly founded by musicians for musicians, with a stated goal to help customers find their tone without the pressure or dismissiveness of big-box retailers. The owner's background in recording engineering and his active music career history create credibility within the guitar community. They position themselves as offering a unique selection unavailable at chain stores and emphasize personalized customer service.

The business operates within standard pawn shop parameters: customers can obtain collateral-based loans, sell items outright, or use consignment services. Operating hours are limited (Tuesday-Friday 10am-6pm, Saturday 10am-5pm, closed Sunday-Monday), which may inconvenience some customers. As with all pawn operations, loan terms, interest rates, and buyback conditions are not disclosed on the website, requiring direct contact for specifics. The geographic focus on Orange County limits accessibility for distant customers despite online sales.
pros: Owner has 10+ years documented experience in guitar and pawn industry
Founded by working musicians with recording engineering credentials (LA Film School)
Specializes in vintage and used guitars/amps with curated selection beyond big-box retailers
Offers collateral-based loans, outright purchases, consignment, and brokerage options
Additional services include live sound production and consulting
Physical showroom location in accessible area (near Knott's Berry Farm, south of 91/5 freeways)
Maintains online inventory and Reverb Shop for remote browsing
cons: Limited operating hours (closed Sunday-Monday, weekdays 10am-6pm) restrict accessibility
No interest rates, loan terms, or fee structures disclosed on website—requires phone contact
Geographic limitation to Orange County showroom despite national online capabilities
No information about buyback periods, loan repayment terms, or item valuation processes
Single physical location limits convenience for customers outside Anaheim area
best_for: Musicians in Orange County seeking to buy, sell, or pawn quality guitars and amplifiers
Collectors of vintage instruments who want expert evaluation from experienced musicians
Customers needing collateral-based loans with flexible item types (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments)
diagnosis: Best for Orange County-area musicians and collectors needing collateral loans or looking to buy/sell quality guitars and amps from an owner with genuine music industry credibility. Main caveat: loan terms, interest rates, and buyback conditions are not publicly disclosed and must be negotiated directly; limited hours and single location reduce accessibility for those outside the immediate Anaheim area.
services: Pawn loans against guitars, amplifiers, jewelry, diamonds, watches, electronics, and other valuables
Purchase of used and vintage guitars and amplifiers
Consignment sales of musical instruments and equipment
Brokerage services for guitars and amps
Gold and jewelry buying and pawning
Diamond and watch evaluation and lending
Fishing gear and tools buying and pawning
Online sales via website and Reverb Shop platform
